◎简　　介  

　　Moscow, our days. The city of big money and passion, magnificent women and wealthy men, social events and dangerous intrigues. Here, beautiful girls dream to get into the world of glamor, flowing silks and sparkling jewels, and the main social matchmaker qiwan.cc cleverly attaches them to safe hands. Dasha, an art historian from the provinces, who arrived in the capital, dreams...
